backstory.original: Qillek is timid, meek and nervous, being a comparably young character in the party and thrown into a world he doesn't understand with no wing to fly him out of a bad situation. His charisma, wit, and superiority ripped away when flying through the Valley of the Storms, taking his left wing and arm away but introducing him to H'esper, who gave him dark visions to push him forward. Inside him is an envious amount of courage and a stable sense of logic when things get dire, which has led other party members to consider him their leader. He doesn't agree with the idea, but he's not ready to let his friends down.
backstory.display: 奇列克胆小、温顺而紧张，是队伍里比较年轻的一个角色。他被扔进了一个他不了解的世界，却没有翅膀让他飞出困境。他的魅力、机智和优越感，都在飞过风暴峡谷时被扯掉，同时带走的还有他的左翼和手臂，但这次经历也让他结识了为他在黑暗中指明前进方向的赫斯帕。在他内心深处有一种独特的勇气，以及在面临危机时稳定的逻辑感，这使其他队伍成员都推崇他作为领袖。他没有这方面的意愿，但他也不想让朋友们失望。

description.original: Qillek attacks the frontmost monsters with a flurry of feathers.
description.display: 奇列克用纷飞的羽毛攻击最前面的怪物。

description.original: Qillek rains purple feathers from above, calming all attacking monsters.
description.display: 奇列克降下紫色羽毛，使所有准备攻击的怪物进入平静。

longDescription.original: Qillek rains purple feathers from above, calming all attacking monsters and slowing their attack speeds by 200% for the next 30 seconds, and slowing their enrage power-up timer by 200% for the next 60 seconds.
longDescription.display: 奇列克降下紫色羽毛，使所有准备攻击的怪物进入平静，同时使其攻击速度降低 200%，持续 30 秒，并使其激怒强化计时器减速 200%，持续 60 秒。

description.desc: Heals all damaged Champions for $amount HP per second. This amount is increased for Champions not adjacent to Qillek by $increase_by_slot% (additively) for each additional slot away from Qillek they are.
每秒为所有受到伤害的勇士回复 $amount 点生命值。每位受伤的勇士每远离奇列克一格，此回复数值就额外提高 $increase_by_slot%（以加算方式堆叠）。

tipText.original: Qillek heals allies that are not adjacent to him.
tipText.display: 奇列克为不与自己相邻的伙伴施加治疗。

conditions.desc: Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to Qillek by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion NOT adjacent to Qillek (additively). Champions exactly two slots away from Qillek provide twice the bonus each.
Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to Qillek by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion NOT adjacent to Qillek (additively).

effect_keys.old_override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion not adjacent to Qillek

conditions.desc: 每有一位与奇列克不相邻的勇士，与奇列克相邻的勇士即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害（以加算方式堆叠）。每位距离奇列克 2 格的勇士将提供双倍加成。
每有一位与奇列克不相邻的勇士，与奇列克相邻的勇士即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害（以加算方式堆叠）。

effect_keys.old_override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion not adjacent to Qillek

tipText.original: Qillek increases the damage of adjacent allies based on how he is positioned in the formation.
tipText.display: 奇列克根据自身在阵型中的位置，提升相邻勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Gold dropped by enemies that are stunned, slowed, or rooted is increased by $(amount)%.
被眩晕、减速或定身的敌人掉落的金币增加 $(amount)%。
Bless also applies to Champions exactly 2 slots away from Qillek
“祝福”也会作用于距离奇列克恰好 2 格的勇士

specializationDescription.original: Qillek focuses on expanding his Bless ability to Champions a bit further away
specializationDescription.display: 奇列克专注于将他的护佑技能拓展到更远的勇士身上

description.desc: Champions exactly 2 slots away from Qillek contribute twice as much to Bless
每位恰好距离奇列克 2 格的勇士将提供双倍护佑加成

specializationDescription.original: Qillek increases the power of his Bless ability based on the number of nearby, but not adjacent, Champions
specializationDescription.display: 奇列克根据位于自身附近，但不相邻的勇士数量来强化他的护佑技能

specializationDescription.original: Qillek focuses on the rewards reaped from slow enemies
specializationDescription.display: 奇列克专注于从减速敌人身上夺取的奖励

description.desc: $(source_hero) contributes $(base_stacks___2) stack to Aerois Synergy per second. Their maximum number of stacks is $(base_max_stacks___2) plus the highest area completed in the current run divided by 5. $10% of his contributed stacks are removed when changing areas. $(upgrade_name id) is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% times the total number of Aerois Synergy stacks.
$(source_hero)每秒为埃罗伊斯协同贡献 $(base_stacks___2) 层堆叠。其最大堆叠层数为 $(base_max_stacks___2) 加上当前关卡中完成的最高区域除以 5。改变区域时，移除他所贡献堆叠层数的 10%。$(upgrade_name id)提高 $(not_buffed amount)% 乘以埃罗伊斯协同的总堆叠层数。

conditions.desc: Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to Qillek by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion NOT adjacent to Qillek (additively). Champions exactly two slots away from Qillek provide twice the bonus each.
Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to Qillek by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion NOT adjacent to Qillek (additively).

effect_keys.old_override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion not adjacent to Qillek

conditions.desc: 每有一位与奇列克不相邻的勇士，与奇列克相邻的勇士即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害（以加算方式堆叠）。每位距离奇列克 2 格的勇士将提供双倍加成。
每有一位与奇列克不相邻的勇士，与奇列克相邻的勇士即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害（以加算方式堆叠）。

effect_keys.old_override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion not adjacent to Qillek

description.original: I know sacrifice. I am stronger for it.
description.display: 我懂得牺牲，我因牺牲而更强大。

description.original: The messenger guild taught me to stand against any obstruction!
description.display: 信使公会教会我，要不畏任何艰难险阻！

description.original: I'll take the lead. For now.

description.display: 一股黑暗的力量在增长。

description.original: Someone is watching out for us.
I see what was and is and will be.
description.display: 我看到了过去、现在和将来。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Qillek is timid, meek and nervous, being a comparably young character in the party and thrown into a world he doesn't understand with no wing to fly him out of a bad situation. His charisma, wit, and superiority ripped away when flying through the Valley of the Storms, taking his left wing and arm away but introducing him to H'esper, who gave him dark visions to push him forward. Inside him is an envious amount of courage and a stable sense of logic when things get dire, which has led other party members to consider him their leader. He doesn't agree with the idea, but he's not ready to let his friends down.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Qillek buffs and heals the formation in unique ways, and synergizes well with other Aerois Champions, like Aila.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 奇列克胆小、温顺而紧张，是队伍里比较年轻的一个角色。他被扔进了一个他不了解的世界，却没有翅膀让他飞出困境。他的魅力、机智和优越感，都在飞过风暴峡谷时被扯掉，同时带走的还有他的左翼和手臂，但这次经历也让他结识了为他在黑暗中指明前进方向的赫斯帕。在他内心深处有一种独特的勇气，以及在面临危机时稳定的逻辑感，这使其他队伍成员都推崇他作为领袖。他没有这方面的意愿，但他也不想让朋友们失望。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 奇列克能以独特的方式为阵型提供增益和治疗，并且能够与艾拉等其他埃罗伊斯勇士良好协同。
